name: streaming_unicode_a7dc_enum
description: U+A7DC enum stream: Root{status: enum{ƛ,other}, note: string}. The incomplete enum value "Ƛ is done-required → null; once closed it folds U+A7DC→U+019B and claims ƛ. #555 Slice 2 admits non-ASCII string-literal/enum/field-name shapes into the native STREAM lane (checkStreamRootSupported narrowed): the streaming cadence is character-agnostic (done-required scalars null-fill until complete; partial strings shown) and the complete-value fold routes through the same bamlunicode-backed final coercer, so native reproduces BAML parse-stream byte-exact per prefix. Per-prefix want values are BAML v0.223 parse-stream (BAMLFUZZ_PARSE_CAPTURE=1); native==BAML for the fold is proven by the bamlunicode Rust reference.
